similar_content_hints.description: Other hadiths from Imam al-Sadiq or other Imams linking fasting to spiritual power and the overcoming of hardships, particularly in times of illness or tribulation.
Hadiths in al-Kafi or other books that interpret the word 'sabr' (patience) in Quranic verses as having specific esoteric meanings beyond simple endurance.
Narrations about the virtues of fasting outside of Ramadan as a voluntary act of worship and spiritual strengthening, especially in the Book of Fasting in al-Kafi.

summaries.bn: ইমাম সাদিক (আ.) কুরআন ২:৪৫-এর 'সবর' শব্দটিকে 'সিয়াম' (রোজা) হিসেবে ব্যাখ্যা করেছেন। তিনি আরো বলেছেন যে বিপদ-মুসিবতের সময় রোজা রাখা উচিত কারণ এটিই আল্লাহর নির্দেশিত পথ।
summaries.de: Imam al-Sadiq (F) gibt eine Deutung von Koran 2:45 und identifiziert «Geduld» mit «Fasten». Er empfiehlt auch das Fasten als spirituelles Mittel gegen Heimsuchungen und Schwierigkeiten.
summaries.en: Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) provides an authoritative Shia exegesis of Quran 2:45, interpreting 'patience' (sabr) as a reference to 'fasting' (siyam). This interpretation links two pillars of Islamic practice: the virtue of patient endurance and the discipline of sawm. The teaching also provides a practical prescription — that when a believer faces hardship or calamity, fasting is the prescribed spiritual remedy, drawing on the strengthening power of the fast as the 'patience' God commands.
summaries.es: El Imam al-Sadiq (P) ofrece una interpretación esotérica de Corán 2:45, identificando 'la paciencia' con 'el ayuno'. Esta enseñanza también prescribe el ayuno como remedio espiritual ante las calamidades y dificultades de la vida.
summaries.fa: امام صادق علیه السلام تفسیری از آیه ۲:۴۵ قرآن ارائه می‌دهند و «صبر» را به «روزه» تأویل می‌کنند. ایشان همچنین دستور عملی می‌دهند که در مواجهه با بلا و سختی، روزه بگیرید.
summaries.fr: L'Imam al-Sadiq (P) fournit une interprétation de Coran 2:45, identifiant «la patience» au «jeûne». Il prescrit également le jeûne comme remède spirituel face aux épreuves et calamités, en s'appuyant sur le commandement divin.
summaries.id: Imam Shadiq (a.s.) menafsirkan 'sabar' dalam Quran 2:45 sebagai 'puasa'. Beliau juga memberikan petunjuk praktis bahwa ketika seseorang ditimpa musibah, berpuasa adalah solusi spiritual yang dianjurkan.
summaries.ru: Имам ас-Садик (мир ему) толкует Коран 2:45, отождествляя «терпение» (сабр) с «постом» (сийам). Он также предписывает пост как духовное средство при постигающих человека бедах и испытаниях.
summaries.tr: İmam Sadık (a.s.), Kur'an 2:45'teki 'sabır' kelimesini 'oruç' olarak yorumlamıştır. Bu yorum, sabır erdemini oruç ibadetiyle bağdaştırır ve sıkıntı anında oruç tutmanın manevi bir çözüm yolu olduğunu gösterir.
summaries.ur: امام صادق علیہ السلام نے قرآن کریم کی آیت ۲:۴۵ کی تفسیر بیان کی کہ 'صبر' سے مراد 'روزہ' ہے۔ آپ نے یہ بھی فرمایا کہ جب کوئی مصیبت اور سختی آئے تو روزہ رکھنا چاہیے کیونکہ اللہ تعالیٰ کا یہی حکم ہے۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目萨迪格（愿主赐他平安）对《古兰经》2:45进行权威诠释，将"坚忍"（صبر）解释为"封斋"（صيام）。他还规定，当信徒遭遇苦难时，封斋是真主所命令的精神救治之道。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/201)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ قَالَ الصَّبْرُ الصِّيَامُ وَ قَالَ إِذَا نَزَلَتْ بِالرَّجُلِ النَّازِلَةُ وَ الشَّدِيدَةُ فَلْيَصُمْ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ وَ اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ يَعْنِي الصِّيَامَ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Suleyman, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [2:45] And seek Assistance with the patience, heasws said: ‘The patience (is a reference to) the Fasts’. And heasws said: ‘When there descends upon the man the descending (afflictions) and the difficulties, so let him Fast, for Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is Saying [2:45] And seek Assistance with the patience, Meaning the Fasts’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sulayman from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “This is about the words of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, ‘Seek support through patience.’ [2:45] Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘“Patience” is a reference to fasting.’ He further said, ‘If a man faces severe difficulties, he should fast. Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, has said, “Seek support through patience,” that is, “fasting.””’

translations.bn: আমাদের কিছু সাথী সাহল ইবনে যিয়াদ থেকে, তিনি মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে সিনান থেকে, তিনি মুনযির ইবনে ইয়াযীদ থেকে, তিনি ইউনুস ইবনে যাবইয়ান থেকে বর্ণনা করেছেন যে:
translations.de: Eine Gruppe unserer Gefährten, von Sahl ibn Ziyad, von Muhammad ibn Sinan, von Mundhir ibn Yazid, von Yunus ibn Zabyan, der sagte:
translations.en: A number of our companions, from Sahl ibn Ziyad, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Mundhir ibn Yazid, from Yunus ibn Zabyan who said:
translations.es: Un grupo de nuestros compañeros, de Sahl ibn Ziyad, de Muhammad ibn Sinan, de Mundhir ibn Yazid, de Yunus ibn Zabyan quien dijo:
translations.fa: عده‌ای از اصحاب ما از سهل بن زیاد، از محمد بن سنان، از منذر بن یزید، از یونس بن ظبیان روایت کردند که:
translations.fr: Un groupe de nos compagnons, de Sahl ibn Ziyad, de Muhammad ibn Sinan, de Mundhir ibn Yazid, de Yunus ibn Zabyan qui dit :
translations.id: Sejumlah sahabat kami, dari Sahl bin Ziyad, dari Muhammad bin Sinan, dari Mundzir bin Yazid, dari Yunus bin Zabyan yang berkata:
translations.ru: Группа наших сподвижников передала от Сахля ибн Зийада, от Мухаммада ибн Синана, от Мунзира ибн Йазида, от Йунуса ибн Забйана, который сказал:
translations.tr: Ashabımızdan bir grup, Sehl b. Ziyad'dan, o Muhammed b. Sinan'dan, o Munzir b. Yezid'den, o Yunus b. Zabyan'dan:
translations.ur: ہمارے اصحاب کی ایک جماعت نے سہل بن زیاد سے، انہوں نے محمد بن سنان سے، انہوں نے منذر بن یزید سے، انہوں نے یونس بن ظبیان سے روایت کی کہ:
translations.zh: 我们的一些同伴，从萨赫勒·本·齐亚德，从穆罕默德·本·锡南，从穆尼齐尔·本·亚齐德，从优努斯·本·扎比扬处听闻其言：

translations.bn: আবু আবদিল্লাহ আলাইহিস সালাম বলেছেন: 'যে ব্যক্তি তীব্র গরমের মধ্যে আল্লাহ আয্যা ওয়া জাল্লার জন্য একদিন রোজা রাখে এবং তৃষ্ণা তাকে স্পর্শ করে, আল্লাহ তার সাথে এক হাজার ফেরেশতা নিযুক্ত করেন যারা তার চেহারা মুছে দেন ও তাকে সুসংবাদ দেন। এমনকি যখন সে ইফতার করে, আল্লাহ আয্যা ওয়া জাল্লা তাকে বলেন: তোমার সুগন্ধ এবং তোমার আত্মা কত পবিত্র! হে আমার ফেরেশতারা, সাক্ষী থাকো যে আমি তাকে ক্ষমা করে দিয়েছি।'
translations.de: Abu Abdillah (Friede sei mit ihm) sagte: 'Wer für Gott, den Mächtigen und Erhabenen, an einem Tag intensiver Hitze fastet und den Durst ertragen muss, dem weist Gott tausend Engel zu, die sein Gesicht streicheln und ihm frohe Botschaft bringen. Bis wenn er das Fasten bricht, sagt Gott, der Mächtige und Erhabene, zu ihm: Wie herrlich ist dein Duft und dein Geist! Meine Engel, seid Zeugen, dass Ich ihm wahrlich vergeben habe.'
translations.en: Abu Abdillah (peace be upon him) said: 'Whoever fasts for the sake of God, Mighty and Majestic, for a day during intense heat and thirst strikes him, God assigns a thousand angels with him, wiping his face and giving him glad tidings. Until when he breaks the fast, God, Mighty and Majestic, says to him: How sweet is your fragrance and your spirit! My angels, bear witness that I have indeed forgiven him.'
translations.es: Abu Abdillah (la paz sea con él) dijo: 'Quien ayuna por el amor de Dios, Poderoso y Majestuoso, durante un día en el intenso calor y la sed le afecta, Dios asigna mil ángeles con él, acariciando su rostro y dándole buenas noticias. Hasta que cuando rompe el ayuno, Dios, Poderoso y Majestuoso, le dice: ¡Qué agradable es tu fragancia y tu espíritu! Mis ángeles, sed testigos de que en verdad le he perdonado.'
translations.fa: ابو عبدالله علیه السلام فرمود: «هر کس در شدت گرما برای خداوند عزّ و جلّ یک روز روزه بگیرد و تشنگی به او برسد، خداوند هزار فرشته موکّل او می‌گرداند که صورتش را مسح کنند و او را بشارت دهند، تا آنکه چون افطار کند، خداوند عزّ و جلّ به او فرماید: چه خوشبو است بوی تو و روح تو! فرشتگانم، شاهد باشید که من او را بخشیدم.»
translations.fr: Abu Abdillah (que la paix soit sur lui) a dit : 'Quiconque jeûne pour l'amour de Dieu, Puissant et Majestueux, durant un jour de chaleur intense et que la soif le touche, Dieu lui assigne mille anges qui essuient son visage et lui annoncent la bonne nouvelle. Jusqu'à ce que lorsqu'il rompt le jeûne, Dieu, Puissant et Majestueux, lui dit : Comme ton parfum et ton esprit sont agréables ! Mes anges, soyez témoins que Je lui ai bien pardonné.'
translations.id: Abu Abdillah (alaihis salam) bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berpuasa karena Allah Azza wa Jalla selama satu hari dalam terik panas yang menyengat lalu rasa haus menimpanya, Allah menugaskan seribu malaikat bersamanya yang mengusap wajahnya dan menyampaikan kabar gembira kepadanya. Hingga ketika ia berbuka puasa, Allah Azza wa Jalla berfirman kepadanya: Betapa harum baumu dan betapa mulia rohmu! Malaikat-malaikat-Ku, saksikanlah bahwa Aku sungguh telah mengampuninya.'
translations.ru: Абу Абдуллах (мир ему) сказал: «Кто постится ради Аллаха, Всемогущего и Величественного, один день в сильную жару и его постигает жажда, Аллах приставляет к нему тысячу ангелов, которые проводят рукой по его лицу и радуют его благой вестью. Пока когда он разговляется, Аллах, Всемогущий и Величественный, говорит ему: Как прекрасен твой аромат и твой дух! Мои ангелы, будьте свидетелями — Я воистину простил его».
translations.tr: Ebu Abdillah (a.s.) buyurdu: 'Kim şiddetli sıcakta Allah azze ve celle için bir gün oruç tutar ve kendisine susuzluk isabet ederse, Allah onunla bin melek görevlendirir; yüzünü sıvazlarlar ve onu müjdelerler. Ta ki orucu açınca, Allah azze ve celle ona: Ne kadar güzel kokuyor ve ruhun ne kadar güzel! Meleklerim, şahit olun, ben onu bağışladım, der.'
translations.ur: ابو عبداللہ علیہ السلام نے فرمایا: 'جو شخص شدید گرمی میں اللہ عزوجل کے لیے ایک دن کا روزہ رکھے اور اسے پیاس لگے، اللہ اس کے ساتھ ہزار فرشتے مقرر کرتا ہے جو اس کا چہرہ مسح کرتے ہیں اور اسے بشارت دیتے ہیں، یہاں تک کہ جب وہ افطار کرے، اللہ عزوجل اس سے فرماتا ہے: تیری خوشبو اور تیری روح کتنی پاکیزہ ہے! میرے فرشتو! گواہ رہو کہ میں نے اسے بخش دیا ہے۔'
translations.zh: 阿布·阿卜杜拉（愿主赐他平安）说：'凡是在酷热之中为至尊至大的安拉封斋一天，且口渴之苦降临其身者，安拉将委派一千位天使随侍其旁，抚摸其脸并向其报喜，直到他开斋之时，至尊至大的安拉对他说：你的芳香与你的灵魂多么美好！我的天使们，你们见证，我确实已宽恕了他。'

Normalized وَ جَلَّ to وَجَلَّ (compound phrase عَزَّ وَجَلَّ)

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ مُنْذِرِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ ظَبْيَانَ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ مَنْ صَامَ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ يَوْماً فِي شِدَّةِ الْحَرِّ فَأَصَابَهُ ظَمَأٌ وَكَّلَ اللَّهُ بِهِ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ يَمْسَحُونَ وَجْهَهُ وَيُبَشِّرُونَهُ حَتَّى إِذَا أَفْطَرَ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ لَهُ مَا أَطْيَبَ رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ مَلَائِكَتِي اشْهَدُوا أَنِّي قَدْ غَفَرْتُ لَهُ

narrators.ambiguity_note: Collective reference to multiple unnamed transmitters of al-Kulayni

narrators.known_identity: Sahl ibn Ziyad al-Adami, a narrator from Rayy, often transmitted by al-Kulayni
Muhammad ibn Sinan al-Zahiri, a companion of Imam al-Ridha (AS) and Imam al-Jawad (AS)

narrators.ambiguity_note: Identity based on chain context; less commonly attested narrator

narrators.known_identity: Yunus ibn Zabyan, a companion of Imam al-Sadiq (AS), known for transmitting hadith on virtues and spirituality
Imam Ja'far ibn Muhammad al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam

key_phrases.phrase_en: How sweet is your fragrance and your spirit

bn.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: তোমার সুগন্ধ ও আত্মা — রোজাদারের আধ্যাত্মিক পবিত্রতার ঐশ্বরিক প্রশংসা
bn.صَامَ: রোজা রাখা — সওম, ফজর থেকে সূর্যাস্ত পর্যন্ত পানাহার থেকে বিরত থাকা
bn.ظَمَأ: তৃষ্ণা — রোজার সময় অনুভূত শারীরিক তৃষ্ণা
bn.وَكَّلَ: নিযুক্ত করা — আল্লাহ বিশেষ ফেরেশতা পাঠান

de.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: Dein Duft und dein Geist — göttliches Lob der spirituellen Reinheit des Fastenden
de.صَامَ: Fastete — Sawm, Enthaltung von Essen und Trinken von der Morgendämmerung bis zum Sonnenuntergang
de.وَكَّلَ: Zuwies — Gott sandte besondere Engel als Begleiter

en.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: Your fragrance and your spirit — poetic divine address praising the spiritual beauty and purity emanating from the fasting person
en.صَامَ: Fasted — from sawm, the act of ritual fasting by abstaining from food, drink, and other things from dawn to sunset
en.ظَمَأ: Thirst — specifically physical thirst experienced during fasting, here understood as a mark of sincere devotion
en.وَكَّلَ: Assigned/entrusted — God entrusting specific angels to accompany the fasting person as a sign of divine honor
en.يَمْسَحُونَ: Wiping/caressing — the angels' act of gently wiping the face as a gesture of comfort and blessing
en.يُبَشِّرُونَهُ: Giving glad tidings — the angels announcing to the fasting person the divine reward that awaits him

es.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: Tu fragancia y tu espíritu — alabanza divina de la pureza espiritual del ayunante
es.صَامَ: Ayunó — sawm, abstenerse de comer y beber desde el amanecer hasta el ocaso
es.ظَمَأ: Sed — sed física experimentada durante el ayuno
es.وَكَّلَ: Asignó — Dios envió ángeles especiales como acompañantes

fa.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: بوی تو و روح تو — ستایش الهی از پاکی روحانی روزه‌دار
fa.صَامَ: روزه گرفت — صوم، خودداری از خوردن و نوشیدن از سپیده‌دم تا غروب
fa.ظَمَأ: تشنگی — تشنگی جسمانی که روزه‌دار تجربه می‌کند
fa.وَكَّلَ: موکّل کرد — خداوند فرشتگان مخصوص فرستاد

fr.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: Ton parfum et ton esprit — éloge divin de la pureté spirituelle du jeûneur
fr.صَامَ: Jeûna — sawm, s'abstenir de manger et boire de l'aube au coucher du soleil
fr.ظَمَأ: Soif — soif physique ressentie pendant le jeûne
fr.وَكَّلَ: Assigna — Dieu envoya des anges spéciaux en accompagnateurs

id.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: Baumu dan rohmu — pujian ilahi atas kesucian spiritual orang yang berpuasa
id.صَامَ: Berpuasa — sawm, menahan diri dari makan dan minum sejak fajar hingga terbenam matahari
id.ظَمَأ: Rasa haus — haus fisik yang dialami saat berpuasa
id.وَكَّلَ: Menugaskan — Allah mengutus malaikat khusus sebagai pendamping

ru.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: Твой аромат и твой дух — Божья похвала духовной чистоте постящегося
ru.صَامَ: Постился — саум, воздержание от еды и питья от рассвета до заката
ru.ظَمَأ: Жажда — физическая жажда, испытываемая во время поста
ru.وَكَّلَ: Приставил — Аллах направил особых ангелов в качестве сопровождающих

tr.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: Kokunuz ve ruhunuz — oruçlunun manevi güzelliğini anlatan ilahi övgü
tr.صَامَ: Oruç tuttu — şafaktan güneş batımına kadar yiyip içmekten kaçınma
tr.وَكَّلَ: Görevlendirdi — Allah'ın özel melekleri refakatçi olarak gönderisi

ur.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: تیری خوشبو اور روح — روزہ دار کی روحانی پاکیزگی کی الٰہی تعریف
ur.صَامَ: روزہ — صوم، فجر سے غروب تک کھانے پینے سے پرہیز
ur.ظَمَأ: پیاس — روزے کی حالت میں محسوس ہونے والی جسمانی پیاس
ur.وَكَّلَ: مقرر کرنا — اللہ کا مخصوص فرشتے بھیجنا

zh.رِيحَكَ وَرَوْحَكَ: 你的芳香与灵魂 — 安拉对封斋者精神纯洁性的赞美
zh.صَامَ: 封斋 — 斋戒，从黎明到日落禁止饮食
zh.ظَمَأ: 口渴 — 封斋期间所经历的身体渴感
zh.وَكَّلَ: 委派 — 安拉派遣特定天使作为陪伴

seo_questions.bn: ইমাম আল-সাদিকের মতে তীব্র গরমে রোজা রাখলে আল্লাহ কী পুরস্কার দেন?
seo_questions.de: Welche Belohnung gibt Gott demjenigen, der bei intensiver Hitze fastet, laut Imam al-Sadiq?
seo_questions.en: What reward does God give to a person who fasts during intense heat according to Imam al-Sadiq?
seo_questions.es: ¿Qué recompensa da Dios a quien ayuna durante el calor intenso según el Imam al-Sadiq?
seo_questions.fa: طبق روایت امام صادق، خداوند به کسی که در گرمای شدید روزه می‌گیرد چه پاداشی می‌دهد؟
seo_questions.fr: Quelle récompense Dieu accorde-t-il à celui qui jeûne pendant la chaleur intense selon l'Imam al-Sadiq ?
seo_questions.id: Apa pahala yang diberikan Allah bagi orang yang berpuasa dalam panas terik menurut Imam al-Shadiq?
seo_questions.ru: Какую награду даёт Аллах тому, кто постится в сильную жару, согласно имаму ас-Садику?
seo_questions.tr: İmam Sadık'a göre şiddetli sıcakta oruç tutan kişi ne ödül alır?
seo_questions.ur: امام صادق علیہ السلام کے مطابق شدید گرمی میں روزہ رکھنے والے کو اللہ کیا ثواب دیتا ہے؟
seo_questions.zh: 根据伊玛目萨迪克，在酷热中封斋的人会得到安拉怎样的奖赏？

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths from Imam al-Sadiq or other Imams describing the virtue of fasting during the month of Sha'ban and the reward of angels accompanying the fasting person.
Narrations describing God addressing the soul of the deceased or believer directly using honorific and praising language regarding their spiritual state.
Hadith literature on the merits of enduring hardship for the sake of God, particularly in the context of worship, and the promise of divine forgiveness.

summaries.bn: ইমাম আল-সাদিক (আলাইহিস সালাম) তীব্র গরমে রোজা রাখার মহান আধ্যাত্মিক পুরস্কার বর্ণনা করেছেন। যে মুমিন তৃষ্ণা সহ্য করে রোজা রাখে, আল্লাহ তার সাথে এক হাজার ফেরেশতা পাঠান এবং ইফতারের সময় নিজেই তার মাগফিরাতের ঘোষণা করেন।
summaries.de: Imam al-Sadiq (Friede sei mit ihm) beschreibt die immense spirituelle Belohnung für das Fasten bei extremer Hitze. Wenn ein Gläubiger den Durst während des Fastens erträgt, weist Gott ihm tausend Engel zu, und beim Fastenbrechen verkündet Gott selbst den Erlass dieser Person vor Seinen Engeln.
summaries.en: Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) describes the immense spiritual reward for fasting during extreme summer heat. When a believer endures the hardship of thirst while fasting, God appoints a thousand angels to comfort him, and upon breaking the fast, God personally proclaims the fasting person's forgiveness before His angels. This hadith was transmitted to early Shia communities to encourage steadfastness in worship during challenging physical circumstances, conveying that sincere devotion to God — even amid bodily hardship — draws divine mercy and forgiveness.
summaries.es: El Imam al-Sadiq (la paz sea con él) describe la inmensa recompensa espiritual por ayunar durante el calor extremo. Cuando un creyente soporta la sed mientras ayuna, Dios envía mil ángeles para acompañarle, y al romper el ayuno, Dios mismo proclama el perdón de esa persona ante Sus ángeles.
summaries.fa: امام صادق علیه السلام ثواب عظیم روزه‌داری در گرمای شدید را بیان فرموده‌اند. مؤمنی که با تحمل تشنگی روزه می‌گیرد، خداوند هزار فرشته همراه او می‌کند و هنگام افطار خود مغفرت وی را اعلام می‌فرماید. این حدیث برای تشویق به پایداری در عبادت در شرایط دشوار جسمی نقل شده است.
summaries.fr: L'Imam al-Sadiq (que la paix soit sur lui) décrit l'immense récompense spirituelle du jeûne par chaleur extrême. Lorsqu'un croyant endure la soif en jeûnant, Dieu lui assigne mille anges pour le réconforter, et lors de la rupture du jeûne, Dieu proclame Lui-même le pardon de cette personne devant Ses anges.
summaries.id: Imam al-Shadiq (alaihis salam) menjelaskan pahala spiritual yang luar biasa bagi orang yang berpuasa di tengah panas yang terik. Ketika seorang mukmin bersabar menanggung rasa haus saat berpuasa, Allah menugaskan seribu malaikat untuk menemaninya, dan saat berbuka, Allah sendiri mengumumkan pengampunan bagi orang tersebut.
summaries.ru: Имам ас-Садик (мир ему) описывает огромное духовное вознаграждение за пост в экстремальную жару. Когда верующий терпит жажду во время поста, Аллах приставляет к нему тысячу ангелов, а при разговении Сам объявляет о прощении этого человека перед ангелами.
summaries.tr: İmam Sadık (a.s.) aşırı sıcakta oruç tutmanın büyük manevi ödülünü anlatmaktadır. Susuzluğa katlanarak oruç tutan mümine Allah bin melek görevlendirir, iftar vaktinde ise bizzat mağfiretini ilan eder. Bu hadis, güç koşullarda ibadette sebatı teşvik etmektedir.
summaries.ur: امام صادق علیہ السلام نے شدید گرمی میں روزہ رکھنے کے عظیم روحانی ثواب کو بیان فرمایا۔ جو مومن پیاس کی تکلیف برداشت کرتے ہوئے روزہ رکھتا ہے، اللہ اس کے ساتھ ہزار فرشتے مقرر فرماتا ہے اور افطار کے وقت خود اس کی مغفرت کا اعلان فرماتا ہے۔ یہ حدیث مشکل حالات میں عبادت کی استقامت کی ترغیب دیتی ہے۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目萨迪克（愿主赐他平安）描述了在酷热中封斋所获得的巨大精神奖赏。当一位信士忍受封斋时的口渴之苦，安拉便委派一千位天使陪伴他，而在开斋之时，安拉亲自在天使面前宣告对此人的宽恕。此圣训传达的信息是：在艰难的身体状况下真诚崇拜安拉，能够招致神圣的慈悯与宽恕。

translation.fr: et lui annonçant la bonne nouvelle

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/202)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ صَامَ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَوْماً فِي شِدَّةِ الْحَرِّ فَأَصَابَهُ ظَمَأٌ وَكَّلَ اللَّهُ بِهِ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ يَمْسَحُونَ وَجْهَهُ وَ يُبَشِّرُونَهُ حَتَّى إِذَا أَفْطَرَ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُ مَا أَطْيَبَ رِيحَكَ وَ رَوْحَكَ مَلَائِكَتِي اشْهَدُوا أَنِّي قَدْ غَفَرْتُ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Munzar Bin Yazeed, from Yunus Bin Zibyan who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who Fasts for the Sake of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic for a day during intense heat, so thirst hits him, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Allocates a thousand Angels with him, wiping his face, and giving him glad tidings until when he breaks the Fast, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Says to him: “How aromatic is your fragrance and your spirit. My Angels! Bear witness that I<sup>azwj</sup> have Forgiven him’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad, from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Mundhir ibn Yazid from Yunus ibn Zabayan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one, for the sake of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, fasts on a very hot day, causing him to experience a great deal of thirst, Allah assigns a thousand angels for his safety who wipe his face until he discontinues his fast.’ Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, then says, ‘How fine is your fragrance and spirit! O My angels, bear witness that I have granted him forgiveness.’”

translations.bn: আহমাদ ইবনে ইদরীস মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে হাস্সান থেকে, তিনি মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে আলী থেকে, তিনি আলী ইবনে আন-নু'মান থেকে, তিনি আব্দুল্লাহ ইবনে তালহা থেকে, তিনি আবু আবদিল্লাহ আলাইহিস সালাম থেকে বর্ণনা করেছেন যে তিনি বলেছেন:
translations.de: Ahmad ibn Idris überlieferte von Muhammad ibn Hassan, von Muhammad ibn Ali, von Ali ibn al-Nu'man, von Abdullah ibn Talha, von Abu Abdillah (Friede sei mit ihm), der sagte:
translations.en: Ahmad ibn Idris, from Muhammad ibn Hassan, from Muhammad ibn Ali, from Ali ibn al-Nu'man, from Abdullah ibn Talha, from Abu Abdillah (peace be upon him) who said:
translations.es: Ahmad ibn Idris narró de Muhammad ibn Hassan, de Muhammad ibn Ali, de Ali ibn al-Nu'man, de Abdullah ibn Talha, de Abu Abdillah (la paz sea con él) quien dijo:
translations.fa: احمد بن ادریس از محمد بن حسان، از محمد بن علی، از علی بن النعمان، از عبدالله بن طلحه، از ابوعبدالله علیه السلام روایت کرد که فرمود:
translations.fr: Ahmad ibn Idris a rapporté de Muhammad ibn Hassan, de Muhammad ibn Ali, de Ali ibn al-Nu'man, d'Abdullah ibn Talha, d'Abu Abdillah (que la paix soit sur lui) qui a dit :
translations.id: Ahmad bin Idris meriwayatkan dari Muhammad bin Hassan, dari Muhammad bin Ali, dari Ali bin Nu'man, dari Abdullah bin Talha, dari Abu Abdillah alaihis salam yang bersabda:
translations.ru: Ахмад ибн Идрис передал от Мухаммада ибн Хассана, от Мухаммада ибн Али, от Али ибн ан-Ну'мана, от Абдуллаха ибн Тальхи, от Абу Абдиллаха (мир ему), который сказал:
translations.tr: Ahmed b. İdris, Muhammed b. Hassan'dan, o Muhammed b. Ali'den, o Ali b. Nu'man'dan, o Abdullah b. Talha'dan, o da Ebu Abdullah (a.s.)'dan rivayet etti ki buyurdu:
translations.ur: احمد بن ادریس نے محمد بن حسان سے، انہوں نے محمد بن علی سے، انہوں نے علی بن النعمان سے، انہوں نے عبد اللہ بن طلحہ سے، انہوں نے ابو عبد اللہ علیہ السلام سے روایت کی کہ آپ نے فرمایا:
translations.zh: 艾哈迈德·本·伊德里斯从穆罕默德·本·哈桑传述，他从穆罕默德·本·阿里传述，他从阿里·本·努尔曼传述，他从阿布杜拉·本·塔尔哈传述，他从阿布·阿卜杜拉（愿主赐他平安）传述，他说：

translations.bn: আল্লাহর রাসূল সাল্লাল্লাহু আলাইহি ওয়া আলিহি বলেছেন: 'রোযাদার ব্যক্তি ইবাদতে থাকে, যদিও সে তার বিছানায় থাকুক, যতক্ষণ সে কোনো মুসলমানের গীবত না করে।'
translations.de: Der Gesandte Gottes (Friede sei mit ihm und seiner Familie) sagte: 'Der Fastende befindet sich im Gottesdienst, auch wenn er auf seinem Bett liegt, solange er keinen Muslim verlästert.'
translations.en: The Messenger of God (peace be upon him and his family) said: 'The fasting person is in a state of worship, even if he is on his bed, as long as he does not backbite a Muslim.'
translations.es: El Mensajero de Dios (la paz sea con él y su familia) dijo: 'El que ayuna está en adoración, aunque esté sobre su cama, mientras no murmure (haga ghibah) de un musulmán.'
translations.fa: رسول خدا صلی الله علیه وآله فرمود: 'روزه‌دار در عبادت است، حتی اگر بر بسترش باشد، مادامی که غیبت مسلمانی را نکند.'
translations.fr: Le Messager de Dieu (que la paix et les bénédictions de Dieu soient sur lui et sa famille) a dit : 'Celui qui jeûne est en adoration, même s'il est sur son lit, tant qu'il ne médit pas d'un musulman.'
translations.id: Rasulullah sallallahu alaihi wa alihi bersabda: 'Orang yang berpuasa berada dalam ibadah, meskipun ia berada di atas tempat tidurnya, selama ia tidak menggunjing seorang Muslim.'
translations.ru: Посланник Бога (мир ему и его семье) сказал: «Постящийся находится в поклонении, даже если он лежит на своей постели, до тех пор, пока он не злословит о мусульманине».
translations.tr: Allah'ın Resulü (s.a.v.s.) buyurdu: 'Oruçlu kişi, yatağında olsa bile, bir Müslümana gıybet etmediği sürece ibadet halindedir.'
translations.ur: رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم نے فرمایا: 'روزہ دار عبادت میں ہے، خواہ وہ اپنے بستر پر ہو، جب تک وہ کسی مسلمان کی غیبت نہ کرے۔'
translations.zh: 真主的使者（愿主赐福于他及其家族）说：'斋戒者处于崇拜之中，即使他躺在床上，只要他不背后诽谤一位穆斯林。'

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِيسَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ النُّعْمَانِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ طَلْحَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ الصَّائِمُ فِي عِبَادَةٍ وَإِنْ كَانَ عَلَى فِرَاشِهِ مَا لَمْ يَغْتَبْ مُسْلِماً

Abdullah ibn Talha al-Nahdi, a companion of Imam al-Sadiq (AS)
Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam (d. 148 AH)

zh.يغتب: 格伯（背后诽谤）——在某人缺席时说其坏话

seo_questions.bn: হাদীস অনুযায়ী রোযাদার কি সব সময় ইবাদতে থাকেন?
seo_questions.de: Befindet sich der Fastende laut Hadith immer im Zustand des Gottesdienstes?
seo_questions.en: Is a fasting person always in a state of worship according to hadith?
seo_questions.es: ¿Está el que ayuna siempre en adoración según el hadith?
seo_questions.fa: آیا روزه‌دار طبق احادیث همیشه در حال عبادت است؟
seo_questions.fr: Celui qui jeûne est-il toujours en état d'adoration selon le hadith ?
seo_questions.id: Apakah orang yang berpuasa selalu dalam keadaan ibadah menurut hadits?
seo_questions.ru: Находится ли постящийся всегда в состоянии поклонения согласно хадису?
seo_questions.tr: Oruçlu kişi hadise göre her zaman ibadet halinde midir?
seo_questions.ur: کیا روزہ دار شخص ہمیشہ عبادت کی حالت میں ہوتا ہے؟
seo_questions.zh: 根据圣训，斋戒者是否始终处于崇拜状态？

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths warning that fasting is nullified or diminished by immoral speech — lying, obscenity, or backbiting — linking the spiritual merit of fasting to moral conduct.
Narrations from the Prophet or Imams about ghibah (backbiting) being among the gravest sins, comparable to eating the flesh of one's dead brother (Quran 49:12).
Teachings affirming that the fasting person earns continuous worship reward throughout the day, connecting sawm to a holistic spiritual transformation rather than a single act.

summaries.bn: ইমাম সাদিক (আ.) নবী মুহাম্মাদ (সা.)-এর এই বাণী বর্ণনা করেছেন যে রোযাদার ব্যক্তি বিশ্রামকালেও ইবাদতের অবস্থায় থাকেন, যতক্ষণ পর্যন্ত সে কোনো মুসলমানের গীবত না করেন। এই হাদীস শিক্ষা দেয় যে রোযা শুধু পানাহার থেকে বিরত থাকা নয়, বরং অন্য মুসলমানের সম্মান রক্ষা করাও এর অপরিহার্য অংশ।
summaries.de: Imam al-Sadiq (F) überliefert diese Aussage des Propheten Muhammad (F), dass der Fastende den ganzen Tag über — selbst im Ruhezustand — in einem Zustand fortwährender Gottesverehrung verweilt, solange er nicht die Ehre eines Mitmuslims durch Verleumdung (Ghibah) verletzt. Dieses Hadith verknüpft den spirituellen Lohn des Fastens mit dem Schutz der Ehre der Gläubigen und lehrt, dass Fasten weit mehr ist als bloße Enthaltung von Speise und Trank.
summaries.en: Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) transmits this saying of the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family) that the fasting person maintains a continuous state of divine worship throughout their day of fasting — even while resting — provided they do not engage in backbiting (ghibah) against a fellow Muslim. This hadith links the spiritual reward of fasting to the avoidance of harmful speech, teaching that fasting is not merely abstention from food and drink but encompasses protection of other Muslims' honor. For the early Muslim audience, this was a profound reminder that acts of worship can be nullified or diminished by moral transgressions.
summaries.es: El Imam al-Sadiq (P) transmite esta enseñanza del Profeta Muhammad (PyBs) en la que se afirma que la persona que ayuna se encuentra en un estado continuo de adoración a lo largo de su día de ayuno —incluso mientras descansa— siempre y cuando no cometa ghibah (murmuración) contra otro musulmán. Este hadith vincula la recompensa espiritual del ayuno a la protección del honor de los creyentes, enseñando que el ayuno trasciende la mera abstención de alimentos.
summaries.fa: امام صادق علیه السلام این سخن پیامبر اکرم صلی الله علیه وآله را نقل می‌کند که روزه‌دار در تمام طول روز، حتی در حال استراحت بر بستر خود، در حالت عبادت و بندگی خداست، به شرط آنکه غیبت مسلمانی را نکند. این حدیث نشان می‌دهد که روزه از ابعاد اخلاقی نیز برخوردار است و حفظ آبروی مسلمانان شرط اصلی بهره‌مندی از ثواب روزه است.
summaries.fr: L'Imam al-Sadiq (P) transmet cet enseignement du Prophète Muhammad (P) selon lequel la personne qui jeûne se trouve dans un état continu d'adoration tout au long de sa journée de jeûne — même au repos — à condition de ne pas commettre la médisance (ghibah) envers un autre musulman. Ce hadith enseigne que le jeûne ne se limite pas à l'abstention de nourriture et de boisson, mais englobe également la protection de l'honneur des croyants.
summaries.id: Imam al-Shadiq (a.s.) menyampaikan sabda Nabi Muhammad (saw) bahwa orang yang berpuasa senantiasa berada dalam keadaan ibadah sepanjang hari puasanya—bahkan ketika beristirahat—selama ia tidak melakukan ghibah (menggunjing) terhadap sesama Muslim. Hadits ini mengajarkan bahwa puasa bukan sekadar menahan diri dari makan dan minum, tetapi juga mencakup penjagaan kehormatan sesama Muslim.
summaries.ru: Имам ас-Садик (мир ему) передаёт это высказывание Пророка Мухаммада (мир ему), согласно которому постящийся пребывает в непрерывном состоянии богопоклонения на протяжении всего дня поста — даже во время отдыха — до тех пор, пока он не совершает гибах (злословие) в отношении другого мусульманина. Этот хадис связывает духовное воздаяние поста с защитой чести верующих, обучая, что пост — это не просто воздержание от еды и питья.
summaries.tr: İmam Sadık (a.s.), Peygamber Efendimizin (s.a.v.s.) bu sözünü aktararak oruçlu kişinin gün boyunca -istirahat etse bile- sürekli bir ibadet halinde bulunduğunu öğretmektedir. Tek istisna, bir Müslümanın gıybetidir; bu fiil oruçlunun manevi kazanımlarını zedelemektedir. Hadis, orucun yalnızca yemek ve içmekten kaçınmak olmadığını, ahlaki boyutunun da olduğunu vurgular.
summaries.ur: امام صادق علیہ السلام نے نبی کریم صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم کا یہ فرمان نقل فرمایا ہے کہ روزہ دار شخص اپنے بستر پر آرام کرتے ہوئے بھی عبادت کی حالت میں رہتا ہے، جب تک وہ کسی مسلمان کی غیبت نہ کرے۔ یہ حدیث روزے کے اخلاقی پہلو کو اجاگر کرتی ہے اور بتاتی ہے کہ روزہ صرف کھانے پینے سے پرہیز کا نام نہیں بلکہ زبان کی حفاظت بھی اس کا لازمی حصہ ہے۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目萨迪格（愿主赐他平安）传述先知穆罕默德（愿主赐福于他及其家族）的这一教导：斋戒者在整个斋戒日中——甚至在休息时——都处于持续的崇拜状态，只要他不对另一位穆斯林进行背后诽谤（格伯）。这段圣训将斋戒的精神奖励与保护信士荣誉联系起来，教导斋戒不仅仅是禁食禁饮，还包括保护同道穆斯林的尊严。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/202)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الصَّائِمُ فِي عِبَادَةٍ وَ إِنْ كَانَ عَلَى فِرَاشِهِ مَا لَمْ يَغْتَبْ مُسْلِماً .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Hassan, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Ali Bin Al Noman, from Abdullah Bin Talha,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The Fasting one, is in worship, and even if he was upon his bed, for as long as he does not backbite a Muslim’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn Hassan from Muhammad ibn Ali from Ali ibn al-Nu’man from ‘Abd Allah ibn Talhah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘A fasting person, even when resting in bed, is in the state of worshipping as long as he does not backbite a Muslim.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/202)
text: مَنْ كَتَمَ صَوْمَهُ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لِمَلَائِكَتِهِ عَبْدِي اسْتَجَارَ مِنْ عَذَابِي فَأَجِيرُوهُ وَ وَكَّلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى مَلَائِكَتَهُ بِالدُّعَاءِ لِلصَّائِمِينَ وَ لَمْ يَأْمُرْهُمْ بِالدُّعَاءِ لِأَحَدٍ إِلَّا اسْتَجَابَ لَهُمْ فِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who conceals his Fast, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Says to His<sup>azwj</sup> Angels: “My<sup>azwj</sup> servant seeks Refuge from My<sup>azwj</sup> Punishment, so I<sup>azwj</sup> hereby Grant him Refuge”, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Exalted Allocates His<sup>azwj</sup> Angel with supplicating for the Fasting ones, and He<sup>azwj</sup> does not Command them with the supplication for anyone except that He<sup>azwj</sup> Answers for them with regards to it’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father, from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that if a person fasts secretly, Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, says to His angels, ‘My servant has sought protection against my punishment, you must give him protection.’ Allah, the most Blessed, the most High, then assigns His angels to pray for the fasting people and in whoever’ s favor He commands them to pray, He hears and accepts their prayers.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/203)
text: النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَكَّلَ مَلَائِكَتَهُ بِالدُّعَاءِ لِلصَّائِمِينَ وَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي  جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَبِّهِ أَنَّهُ قَالَ مَا أَمَرْتُ مَلَائِكَتِي بِالدُّعَاءِ لِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِي إِلَّا اسْتَجَبْتُ لَهُمْ فِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from Haroun Bin Muslim, from Mas’ada,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, from his<sup>asws</sup> forefathers<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Might and Majestic Allocates His<sup>azwj</sup> Angels with the supplication for the Fasting ones’. And he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> informs me<sup>saww</sup> about his<sup>as</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> that He<sup>azwj</sup> Said: ‘I<sup>azwj</sup> do not Command My<sup>azwj</sup> Angels with the supplication for anyone from My<sup>azwj</sup> creatures except that I<sup>saww</sup> Answer to them with regards to it’’’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ali has narrated from Harun ibn Muslim from Mas’adah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah has narrated from his ancestors, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, that the Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, has assigned His angels to pray in favor of the fasting people. He (the Holy Prophet) has said, ‘ Jibril has informed me from his Lord who has said, “When I command My angels to pray in favor of someone, I do not leave their prayers without acceptance.’””

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/203)
text: نَوْمُ الصَّائِمِ عِبَادَةٌ وَ نَفَسُهُ تَسْبِيحٌ .

en.hubeali: And by this chain,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Sleep of the Fasting-one is worship, and his breathing is Glorification’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated, through the same chain (narrators of previous Hadith), who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a fasting person’s sleeping is also counted as worshipping and his breathing as speaking of the glory of Allah.”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن ويمكن أن يعد صحيحا - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/203)
text: أَوْحَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَى مُوسَى  ( عليه السلام ) مَا يَمْنَعُكَ مِنْ مُنَاجَاتِي فَقَالَ يَا رَبِّ أُجِلُّكَ عَنِ الْمُنَاجَاةِ لِخُلُوفِ فَمِ الصَّائِمِ فَأَوْحَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَيْهِ يَا مُوسَى لَخُلُوفُ فَمِ الصَّائِمِ أَطْيَبُ عِنْدِي مِنْ رِيحِ الْمِسْكِ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Might and Majestic Revealed unto Musa<sup>as</sup>: “What prevents you<sup>as</sup> from whispering to Me<sup>azwj</sup>?’ So he<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! I<sup>as</sup> delayed from the whispering due to the smell of the mouth of a Fasting-one’. So Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Revealed unto him<sup>as</sup>: “O Musa<sup>as</sup>! The smell of a mouth of a Fasting one is more aromatic in My<sup>azwj</sup> Presence than the smell of musk’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ali has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn Isma‘il from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan all from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain individuals of our people who have said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, sent revelation to Moses, thereby asking him, ‘What keeps you from speaking to Me?’ Moses replied, ‘It is to keep away the bad breath of fasting in order to respect your glory.’ Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, then sent him revelation that said, ‘O Moses, bad breath of a fasting person is more beloved to Me than musk.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/204)
text: قَالَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) قِيلُوا فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُطْعِمُ الصَّائِمَ وَ يَسْقِيهِ فِي مَنَامِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Mansour Bin Al Abbas, from Amro Bin Saeed, from Al Hassan Bin Sadaqa who said,
‘Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Have a midday nap, for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Feeds the Fasting-one and Quenches him in his sleep’.
en.sarwar: 14. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Mansur ibn al-‘Abbas from ‘Amr ibn Sa‘id from al-Hassan ibn Sadaqah who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Rest in the form of a short nap between sunrise and noontime; Allah gives food and water to a fasting person during his sleep.”’

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/204)
text: هُ قَالَ لِلصَّائِمِ فَرْحَتَانِ فَرْحَةٌ عِنْدَ إِفْطَارِهِ وَ فَرْحَةٌ عِنْدَ لِقَاءِ رَبِّهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Salma Sahib Al Sabiry, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘For the Fasting-one there are two joys – a joy during his breaking Fast, and a joy during meeting his Lord<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 15. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Salmah Sahib al-Sabiriy from ibn abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a fasting person enjoys two occasions of happiness: one is at the time of ending his fast, and the other is when he meets his Lord.”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/204)
text: إِذَا رَأَى الصَّائِمُ قَوْماً يَأْكُلُونَ أَوْ رَجُلًا يَأْكُلُ سَجَّتْ كُلُّ شَعْرَةٍ مِنْهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al samman Al Armany,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the Fasting-one sees a group of people eating, or a man eating, every hair of his supplicates for him’.
en.sarwar: 16. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Samman al-Armaniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when a fasting person observes people or a person eating food, every piece of his hair feels a kind of covering (tranquility).”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/205)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ صَامَ لِلَّهِ يَوْماً فِي شِدَّةِ الْحَرِّ فَأَصَابَهُ ظَمَأٌ وَكَّلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِهِ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ يَمْسَحُونَ وَجْهَهُ وَ يُبَشِّرُونَهُ حَتَّى إِذَا أَفْطَرَ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَا أَطْيَبَ رِيحَكَ وَ رَوْحَكَ مَلَائِكَتِي اشْهَدُوا أَنِّي قَدْ غَفَرْتُ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Bakr Bin Salih, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Munzir Bin Yazeed, from Yunus Bin Zibyan who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who Fasts for the Sake of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> for a day in intense heat, so thirst hits him, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Allocates a thousand Angels with him, wiping his face and giving him glad tidings until when he breaks fast, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Says: ‘How aromatic is your fragrance and your spirit. My Angels! Bear witness that I<sup>azwj</sup> have Forgiven him’.
en.sarwar: 17. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad, from Bakr ibn Salih from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Mundhir ibn Yazid from Yunus ibn Zabayan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one, for the sake of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, fasts on a very hot day, causing him to experience a great deal of thirst, Allah assigns a thousand angels for his safety who wipe his face until the time he discontinues his fast. Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, then says, “How fine is your fragrance and spirit! O My angels, bear witness that I have granted him forgiveness.””’
